old_claim.note: Technical Patent Examination provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim.note: Patent models were submitted with descriptions and drawings for Patent Office examination, giving the retained model collection its administrative purpose before public display.

source_shape.source_locator: Hagley says patent applicants submitted scale models with written descriptions and drawings for examination by the U.S. Patent Office.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The source connects patent models directly to Patent Office examination practice.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: This upgrades the existing edge because examination explains why models were submitted and retained, while public display is a later use of the same artifacts.

invariant_preserved_or_changed: Preserved: technical_patent_examination remains an enabling prerequisite; changed: the edge now has museum-source evidence and a model-specific note.
would_reject_if: The node were rescoped to private collector holdings detached from Patent Office applications.
A source showed patent models were never used for examination or application review.
The technical_patent_examination node were removed or narrowed away from the Patent Office process.
short_reason: Patent models were submitted for Patent Office examination.
